scope: Migration wave: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only, matching internal/connectors/katana's exact endpoint set. The full Katana surface (bill of materials, purchase orders, stock, webhooks, etc.) is excluded with concrete reasons below.

excluded.reason: /v1/bom_rows is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/v1/purchase_orders is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/v1/stocktakes is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/v1/webhooks is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
Legacy katana is read-only, no write actions implemented
